known_issues_069: 4-5 second startup delay — PRIMARY TARGET for 069. Something blocking on boot. Profile each module load time. Likely a module doing network or filesystem I/O on import. Fix: lazy-load heavy imports inside tool functions not at module top.
Canvas open delay — V noted canvas also slow to open. May be same root cause as startup delay or separate issue. Profile canvas._build_tabs() or similar init path.
Tool Lister intermittent firing — [TOOL:x: input] parsing flaky or TrinityGuard residual. Direct calls work reliably. Needs systematic test of all Tool Lister calls.

gage_closed.png missing — FileNotFoundError at /home/trinity/Ethica/gage_closed.png. gage_ai.py L29 uses relative path. Run: find ~/Ethica -name 'gage_*.png' to locate asset, then fix path to absolute.

KEYWORD_GROUPS case sensitivity audit — values must match module display_name in manifest.json exactly. Any mismatch = module invisible to Trinity. Run: grep display_name ~/Ethica/modules/*/manifest.json and cross-reference.
nyxt_config.json missing software_render field — noted in 066, still not added.

critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — git -C ~/Ethica for all git ops
critical_debug_context.option_b_rule: V runs all commands, pastes output — non-negotiable.
critical_debug_context.repr_first_rule: When string match fails — always repr() before retrying.
critical_debug_context.heredoc_escape_rule: Never use \n in heredoc strings — use chr(10) or write to /tmp/patch_xxx.py.
critical_debug_context.script_over_heredoc_rule: Complex multi-line patches — write to /tmp/patch_xxx.py and run with python3.
critical_debug_context.chmod_first_rule: Always chmod u+w <file> before patching vault-sealed files. Always.
critical_debug_context.importlib_rule: Inside Ethica use importlib.import_module() not bare from imports in chat_engine hooks.
critical_debug_context.wormbot_autofix_rule: WormBot AUTO_FIX is ALL FALSE. Never re-enable without V explicit approval.
critical_debug_context.init_reexport_rule: Never remove imports from __init__.py without verifying re-export status.
critical_debug_context.dual_output_security_rule: logging.critical + print() in security alert handlers — do not convert.
critical_debug_context.trinity_signature_rule: Never convert print() inside Trinity Signature verification blocks.
critical_debug_context.main_block_print_rule: Never convert print() inside if __name__ == '__main__' blocks.
critical_debug_context.cap_net_raw_rule: setcap requires real binary not symlink. Always readlink -f first.
critical_debug_context.tkinter_thread_rule: Never call Tkinter from daemon thread — use queue.Queue + root.after() drain pattern.
critical_debug_context.three_registration_rule: New modules need: (1) module folder + manifest, (2) MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py, (3) MODULE_TRIGGERS + dispatch hook in chat_engine.py.
critical_debug_context.on_done_rule: Every tool dispatch in chat_engine.py _pre_intercept MUST call on_done() after on_response(). Missing on_done() freezes the UI permanently.

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (invoke_count reset to 0 at 068 open)

lesson_learned_068: Two drop zones exist — chat zone (main_window._on_file_drop) and canvas zone (canvas_window._on_canvas_file_drop). Each has independent routing logic. A fix to one does not fix the other. Always grep both when adding new file type handling. The zip early-exit must go BEFORE the file read block — extension routing after a binary read is too late. Ops panel keeps chat clean for training data — route utility output there, not notify_fn.

new_rules_068.two_drop_zones_rule: Ethica has two independent drop zones: main_window._on_file_drop (chat zone) and canvas_window._on_canvas_file_drop (canvas zone). New file type handlers must be added to BOTH. Always grep both files when wiring new extension handling.
new_rules_068.early_exit_before_read_rule: In drop handlers, extension routing must happen BEFORE any file read attempt. Binary files (zip, pdf, images) will corrupt as text. ext check → early return → then open() for text files only.

philosophy: Session 068 — The archive landed clean. Drop a zip, Ethica counts the files, offers the key. Chat stays pure — Ops holds the tools. Two zones, one intention. The scaffold holds. ⟁Σ∿∞
